prompt.title: Search the committee record
prompt.body: Enter a term to find topics, decisions, ADRs, minutes, and wiki pages.

empty.title: No matches
empty.body: Nothing matched “{{query}}”. Try a different term.

error.title: Search failed
error.body: The search could not be completed. Please try again.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.permissionDenied: You do not have access to this.
common.comingSoon: This area will be built in a later phase.
common.phase2Body: This area is planned for Phase 2 and isn’t available yet.

actions.title: Actions
actions.newSoon: Creating actions ships in a later slice.

empty.title: No actions match these filters
empty.body: No actions match the current filters. Clear them to see the full register.

error.title: Couldn’t load the actions
error.body: The service is temporarily unavailable. Your filters are saved — retry in a moment.

actions.notFoundBody: This action does not exist or has been removed.

dlg.error: The action could not be updated. Please try again.
dlg.noteHelp: Optional — note the evidence of completion.
dlg.progressErr: Enter a whole number from 0 to 100.

body.start: Move this action to In Progress.
body.block: Mark the action Blocked and record why it is stuck.
body.unblock: Return this action to In Progress. The blocking reason is kept in its history.
body.progress: Set how far along this action is, from 0 to 100 percent.
body.complete: Mark the work done. You can add a short note of what was completed.
body.cancel: Cancel this action. This cannot be undone — a re-open is a new action.
body.verify: Confirm the completed work. You cannot verify an action you own — this is recorded and cannot be edited.

create.title: Create an action
create.subtitle: A tracked follow-up item.
create.error: The action could not be created. Please try again.

adrs.title: ADRs & Invariants

empty.title: Nothing to show
empty.body: No ADRs match the current filters.

error.title: Couldn’t load the ADRs
error.body: The service is temporarily unavailable. Your filters are saved — retry in a moment.

adrs.notFoundBody: This ADR does not exist or has been removed.

create.title: Create an ADR
create.subtitle: MADR-lite architecture decision record.
create.error: The ADR could not be created. Please try again.
create.contextPh: The problem and the forces at play…

create.statementPh: The rule systems must never violate…

empty.title: No audit events
empty.body: No recorded events match these filters.

error.title: Couldn't load the audit trail
error.body: The audit register failed to load. Retry, or contact an administrator if it persists.

risks.notFoundBody: This risk does not exist or has been removed.

create.title: Create a risk
create.subtitle: Register a risk for tracking and mitigation.
create.error: The risk could not be created. Please try again.
create.planPh: How the risk will be reduced (optional)…

empty.body: No dependency links match the current filters. Clear them to see the full register.

error.body: The service is temporarily unavailable. Your filters are saved — retry in a moment.

deps.notFoundBody: This dependency does not exist or has been removed.

create.title: Create a dependency
create.subtitle: A typed link between two artifacts.
create.error: The dependency could not be created. Please try again.

err.selfLoop: An artifact cannot depend on itself.

panel.title: Traceability
panel.empty: No typed relationships or dependencies yet.

trace.noRoute: No detail page for this artifact type yet.

graph.title: Traceability & dependencies
graph.keyboardHint: Arrow keys move focus between linked artifacts · Enter opens
graph.partial: Showing a partial graph — some links beyond this view aren't shown.
graph.empty: No linked artifacts at this depth.
graph.unsupported: Open the impact graph from the artifact's own page.

create.title: Add a relationship
create.subtitle: A typed traceability edge between two artifacts.
create.error: The relationship could not be created. Please try again.

err.selfLoop: An artifact cannot relate to itself.

decisions.notFoundBody: This decision does not exist or has been removed.

convert.title: Convert to ADR
convert.subtitle: Create an Architecture Decision Record
convert.body: This creates a new Draft ADR pre-filled from {{key}} and links the two. You can refine the ADR before proposing it.
convert.preview: A new Draft ADR will be created and linked to this decision in both directions.
convert.error: The ADR could not be created. Please try again.

field.title: Title
field.titlePh: A short headline for this decision
field.statementPh: State plainly what the committee decided
field.rationalePh: Why the committee reached this outcome
field.alternativesPh: Options that were weighed and not chosen
field.conditionPh: A condition that must be met

supersede.title: Supersede this decision
supersede.subtitle: Records a new decision that replaces this one
supersede.reasonPh: Explain why this decision is being replaced…
supersede.warn: The original decision is never deleted. It is marked Superseded and kept in the immutable history.
supersede.error: The decision could not be superseded. Please try again.

err.title: A title is required.
err.conditions: A conditionally-approved decision needs at least one condition.

voting.commentPh: Add a comment with your vote (optional)…
voting.castNote: You can change your vote until voting closes.
voting.recuseNote: Recusal is recorded by name and removes you from the quorum base.
voting.notOpenSub: The ballot is configured. The chair opens voting when the item is reached.
voting.viewOnlySub: You are not an eligible voter for this committee. You can follow the live tally and result.
voting.recusedSub: You recused from this vote for a conflict of interest and are excluded from the quorum base.
voting.confirmBody: Voting is attributed. Your name and choice will be visible to the committee and recorded in the audit log.
voting.notFoundBody: This vote does not exist or has been removed.
voting.castError: Your vote could not be recorded. Please try again.
voting.openError: Voting could not be opened — the present quorum is not yet met.
voting.closeError: Voting could not be closed — the required votes have not been cast.

create.title: Configure a vote session
create.subtitle: Voting is always attributed — anonymity is out of scope.
create.linkedNote: The vote is bound to this agenda item.
create.votersHint: Seeded from the committee's voting-eligible members.
create.quorumHint: How many eligible voters must be present to open and must cast to close.
create.coiNote: Recusals are recorded by name and removed from the quorum base. Each ballot shows a recuse control to the voter.
create.error: The vote could not be configured. Please try again.

err.voters: Select at least two eligible voters.
err.quorum: Quorum must be between 1 and the number of eligible voters.

nav.auditSub: Every action is recorded to an immutable, tamper-evident log.

auth.subtitle: Sign in to continue
auth.secure: You’ll continue to the secure identity service to sign in.
auth.invite: Access is by invitation only · authentication is handled by the central identity service.
auth.completingBody: Completing the secure sign-in with the identity service and loading your committee profile.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please log in again.

notif.title: Notifications
notif.emptyBody: New notifications about your topics, meetings, and actions will appear here.
notif.noUnreadBody: You've read everything. Switch to All to see your full history.

state.emptyBody: Items will appear here once they are created.

sub.committee: Here’s where the committee stands today.
sub.secretary: Your triage, minutes and escalation queue at a glance.
sub.chairman: Decisions, votes and risks awaiting your sign-off.

error.title: Couldn’t load the dashboard
error.body: Something went wrong fetching your dashboard data. Try again.

dashboard.noDeferred: No topics deferred twice or more.

admin.title: Administration

sub.templates: Standardized templates for topics, ADRs, minutes, decisions, and research
sub.health: Live status of core services and integrations
sub.streams: Delivery streams and their committee owners
sub.roles: Read-only reference — roles & capabilities are defined in Keycloak
sub.jobs: Background job queues, schedules, and recent runs (Hangfire)
sub.notifications: Delivery channels and per-event default notifications

kc.title: Roles are read-only
kc.note: committee roles are sourced from Keycloak claims. ACMP does not create accounts or edit roles — there is no self-registration. Membership and voting eligibility are managed here.

admin.assignmentsHint: Topic and action assignments appear here once those modules ship.
admin.emptyBody: Members appear here after they first sign in through Keycloak.

detail.roleReadonly: Role is read-only — managed in Keycloak

roles.kcRef: Mirrored from Keycloak realm roles — read-only.

secretary.who: Runs the workflow end to end

notif.matrixSub: In-app is the only delivery channel in v1. Email and Webex are planned for Phase 2.

inapp.name: In-app
inapp.desc: The only delivery channel in v1. Always on — every committee event reaches the recipient in-app.

email.name: Email
email.desc: Planned for Phase 2. SMTP delivery of digests and high-priority events. Not active in v1.

webex.name: Webex / Tarseem
webex.desc: Planned for Phase 2. Meeting and vote reminders pushed to Webex spaces. Not active in v1.

templates.emptyBody: Topic, ADR, minutes, decision, and research templates are managed here in a later phase.

streams.emptyBody: Delivery streams and their committee owners land with the stream registry (BL-024).

jobs.retryError: Couldn't re-queue the job. Please try again.
jobs.notConfiguredBody: Background jobs (Hangfire) aren't running on this instance, so there's nothing to monitor. This is expected on test or minimal deployments.
jobs.emptyBody: Background jobs appear here as the scheduler runs them.

empty.title: No topics match these filters
empty.body: No backlog items match the current filters. Clear the filters or submit a new topic to get started.

error.title: Couldn’t load the backlog
error.body: The service is temporarily unavailable. Your filters are saved — retry in a moment.

calendar.note: Scheduled and due-date markers appear once topics are scheduled to meetings (P6).

timeline.note: Planned timelines appear once topics are scheduled to meetings (P6).

prepare.error: Couldn’t mark this topic prepared. Try again.
prepare.forbidden: You don’t have permission to prepare this topic.

submit.title: Submit a topic
submit.subtitle: Provide enough context for the committee to triage and schedule.
submit.autosaveNote: Draft saves automatically on this device as you type.
submit.submitError: Couldn’t submit the topic. Check the form and try again.
submit.fTitleHelp: Be specific — this appears in the backlog and agenda.
submit.fTitlePh: e.g. Adopt Keycloak as the standard IdP
submit.fDescriptionPh: Describe the proposed change and its scope…
submit.fStreamsPh: Type a stream and press Enter…
submit.fSystemsPh: Type a system and press Enter…
submit.dropFiles: Drop files here or click to upload
submit.dropHint: PDF, PNG, SVG, DOCX · up to 25 MB
submit.guardBody: This topic hasn’t been submitted to the committee. Your draft is saved on this device, so you can finish it later.

sec.typeHelp: Classify the request and give it a clear, specific title.
sec.justificationHelp: Explain the problem and why the committee should act.
sec.scopeHelp: Tag the streams and systems this topic touches.
sec.attachmentsHelp: Add evaluations, diagrams, or supporting documents.
sec.urgencyHelp: Helps the Secretary of the Committee prioritize triage.

typeDesc.ArchitectureDecision: A technical decision needing committee approval

urgencyDesc.Urgent: Blocks delivery or has a hard deadline

err.title: Title is required.
err.titleLong: Title must be 120 characters or fewer.
err.streams: Add at least one affected stream.
err.fileSize: Each file must be {{max}} MB or smaller.

kanban.hint: Drag cards between columns, or focus a card and press M to move it by keyboard.
kanban.illegal: Can’t move to {{bucket}} in this phase — scheduling needs a meeting (coming in a later phase).
kanban.actionError: That action couldn’t be completed. Try again.

accept.title: Accept {{key}} into the backlog
accept.body: Accepting assigns an owner and moves the topic into the active backlog.

return.title: Return {{key}}
return.body: Send this topic back with a reason. Defer keeps it for a later revisit; reject closes it.

detail.notFoundBody: This topic doesn’t exist or may have been removed.
detail.noComments: No comments yet. Start the discussion.

attach.empty: No attachments yet. Drop files to add them.

votes.emptyBody: Votes appear here once the committee votes on this topic (Voting, P9).

rel.title: Relationships
rel.emptyBody: Decisions, ADRs, actions, and risks will appear here as they’re linked to this topic in later phases.

meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.listSub: Schedule, build the agenda, and publish to the committee.

schedule.title: Schedule a meeting
schedule.sub: Create a committee meeting, then build its agenda.
schedule.windowInvalid: The end time must be after the start time.
schedule.joinAutoNote: Auto-generated by Webex — the join link appears on the meeting once it's saved.
schedule.failed: Couldn't schedule the meeting. Please try again.

empty.title: No meetings scheduled yet
empty.body: Meetings will appear here once they're scheduled.

error.title: Couldn't load meetings
error.body: There was a problem loading meetings. Please try again.

notFound.title: Meeting not found
notFound.body: We couldn't find a meeting with that reference.

noAgenda.title: No agenda yet
noAgenda.body: Build the agenda to see the running order here.

meetings.comingSoon: This control will be built in a later phase.

poolEmpty.title: Nothing to schedule
poolEmpty.body: Open an accepted topic and choose “Mark prepared” to add it to this pool.

agendaEmpty.title: No items yet
agendaEmpty.body: Add prepared topics from the left, or drag them here to build the agenda.

agendaEmptyView.body: This meeting has no agenda items.

publish.title: Publish agenda
publish.sub: Lock the order and notify attendees.
publish.notifyAll: All committee members will be notified.

ready.title: Agenda published — ready to start
ready.body: Starting the meeting opens the live workspace for attendance, discussion notes, and timing.

notReady.title: Not started yet
notReady.body: Publish the agenda first, then start the meeting to open the live workspace.

concluded.title: Meeting concluded
concluded.body: The meeting has ended. Minutes capture arrives in a later phase.

cancelled.title: Meeting cancelled
cancelled.body: This meeting was cancelled. Its topics were returned to the backlog for rescheduling.

notReady.title: Agenda not published
notReady.body: This meeting can't start until its agenda is built and published.

inProgress.title: Meeting in progress
inProgress.body: Live notes and attendance are being captured. Minutes are drafted when the meeting concludes.

concluded.title: Meeting concluded
concluded.body: A minutes draft will be available for review once the Minutes module ships.

cancelled.title: Meeting cancelled
cancelled.body: This session was cancelled and its scheduled topics returned to the backlog.

mom.title: Minutes of meeting

notReady.title: Minutes open after the meeting starts
notReady.body: Once this meeting is in progress or held, the Secretary can capture its minutes here.

denied.title: No published minutes yet
denied.body: The minutes for this meeting have not been published. You'll be able to read the record here once it is approved.

mom.startNote: Draft the official record of this meeting, then send it for review.
mom.reviewNote: Approving publishes these minutes and locks them as an immutable, audit-logged record.
mom.correctionsNote: Published minutes are immutable. A correction creates a new version that supersedes this one.
mom.supersedeNote: This publishes a corrected new version under the same key; the current version is kept, read-only, and linked.
mom.supersedeError: Couldn't supersede the minutes. Please try again.
mom.exportSoon: PDF export arrives in a later phase

banner.draft: Editable — save your changes as you write.
banner.published: Published & locked — this record is immutable and audit-logged.

recording.title: Recording & transcript

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this recording?
deleteConfirm.body: The recording is removed from this meeting. For an uploaded file the stored copy is deleted too. This can't be undone.

recording.uploadHint: MP4, WebM or MOV video of the meeting

empty.title: No recording yet
empty.body: The meeting recording will appear here once it is uploaded.

recording.error: The recording could not be uploaded. Check the file type and size, then try again.

meetings.notePlaceholder: Capture the discussion for this item…

captured.title: Captured on this item
captured.empty: Nothing has been captured on this item yet.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or may have been moved. Check the address, or head back to your dashboard.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.body: An unexpected error interrupted this page. Your work was not lost. Reload to try again, or return to your dashboard.

viewSub.actions: Action status · open, verified, and overdue

sub.supersede: decisions revised by a superseding record
sub.verification: closed actions verified by a reviewer

empty.title: No reporting data yet
empty.body: Reports populate as committee activity is recorded.

error.title: Couldn’t load reports
error.body: Something went wrong loading the reporting data.

research.question: Research question

research.notFoundBody: This research mission does not exist or has been removed.

convert.subtitleRec: Create a backlog work item from this recommendation.

empty.body: Commission a discovery mission to start capturing findings and recommendations.

create.title: New research mission
create.subtitle: Commission a discovery mission. You’ll be recorded as its lead.

create.question: Research question
create.questionPh: What is this mission trying to answer?
create.keystoneHelp: Optional — stored for reference; Keystone is not required.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel this mission
cancelDialog.subtitle: Record why the mission is being cancelled. This cannot be undone.
cancelDialog.reasonPh: Why is this mission being cancelled?

findingDialog.title: Add a finding
findingDialog.subtitle: Capture what the discovery work uncovered.

recDialog.title: Add a recommendation
recDialog.subtitle: Propose an action for the committee to consider.

error.title: Couldn’t load the wiki
error.body: The service is temporarily unavailable. Retry in a moment.

empty.title: No pages yet
empty.body: Start the knowledge base by writing the committee’s first reference page.

searchEmpty.title: No matching pages
searchEmpty.body: No wiki page matches your search. Try a different term.

select.title: Select a page
select.body: Choose a page from the tree to start reading.

versions.title: Version history
versions.subtitle: Every save creates an immutable snapshot. Select one to view it.

create.title: New wiki page
create.subtitle: Draft a reference page. It stays a draft until you publish it.
create.error: The page could not be created. Please try again.
create.tagsPh: Add a tag and press Enter…

templates.title: Templates
templates.subtitle: Standardized templates for topics, ADRs, minutes, and research.

picker.label: Start from a template
picker.replaceHint: Clear the field to use a template.

empty.title: No templates yet
empty.body: Create the first template to standardize how the committee records its work.

error.title: Couldn’t load the templates
error.body: The service is temporarily unavailable. Retry in a moment.

deprecate.title: Deprecate this template
deprecate.subtitle: A deprecated template can no longer be used to pre-fill new artifacts. This can’t be undone.

form.createSubtitle: Create a template for a target artifact type.
form.editSubtitle: Revise the name and body. Target type is fixed after creation.
form.error: The template could not be saved. Please try again.
form.name: Name
form.targetTypeLocked: Target type is immutable after creation.
